# structured-clause-agent v{{VERSION}}

## 🚀 Highlights

- Native Claude Code plugin support with real-time skill injection
- Subagent orchestration engine
- Skill Intelligence 2.0 (scoring, auto-update, creation)
- Docker support + full deployment guide
- Interactive TUI

## What's New

{{HIGHLIGHTS}}

## Installation

```bash
npm install -g structured-clause-agent@{{VERSION}}
```

Or via Docker:

```bash
docker pull your-registry/structured-clause-agent:{{VERSION}}
```
